task_type: Type B read-only implementation plan (planning/schema/test-contract only — no executable code, no DB write, no backtest)
source_decision: P258C_D3_READ_ONLY_PREREGISTRATION_DESIGN_READY — translate the merged D3 pre-registration design into a safe implementation plan
goal: Translate the merged P258C D3 adversarial-null survivor gate pre-registration design into a SAFE, read-only IMPLEMENTATION PLAN: module boundaries, data contracts, artifact schemas, validation contracts, a future test plan, and explicit STOP gates. The plan describes WHAT a future P258E read-only skeleton would build, without building anything executable now.
non_goals: Does NOT implement the gate or any module — names are proposed for a future P258E, not created.
Does NOT run D3 against any real candidate method.
Does NOT run strategy backtests or any execution.
Does NOT write DB, mutate registry, touch recommendation logic, controlled_apply, or deployment.
Does NOT claim improved prediction accuracy.
Does NOT convert D3 into an approval gate — passing means only 'not yet rejected'.

source_artifacts_used.P258C: outputs/research/p258c_d3_adversarial_null_gate_preregistration_20260608.json — gate pre-registration design (matched null family, endpoints, correction family, risk triggers)
source_artifacts_used.P257A: outputs/research/p257a_best_nbet_strategy_overview_historical_replay_20260608.json — best-N-bet baseline every candidate must beat

module_boundary_proposal.principle: Strict separation between (a) read-only candidate/baseline INGEST adapters, (b) PURE null-construction + statistics functions with no I/O, (c) a thin ORCHESTRATOR that only reads artifacts and writes a diagnostic artifact, and (d) a VALIDATION layer that fails closed. No module may import production, registry, recommendation, controlled_apply, or DB-write code.
layers: ingest_adapter: read-only loaders for candidate output artifacts + P257A baseline artifact; no DB write; no live fetch.
null_factory: pure functions building the matched adversarial-null family from declared degrees of freedom; deterministic given seeds.
statistics: pure McNemar / paired-bootstrap / empirical-null-percentile / BH-FDR / Bonferroni functions; no I/O.
orchestrator: reads inputs, calls null_factory + statistics under validation, emits a diagnostic-only gate artifact; never promotes.
audit: structured audit-trail writer to the artifact only (no DB, no logs-as-state).
module_boundary_proposal.import_ban: validation layer asserts orchestrator and all gate modules do NOT import lottery_api recommendation/registry/production/controlled_apply/deployment/DB-write paths.

proposed_future_module_names_P258E_ONLY_.note: These are PROPOSED names for a future P258E read-only skeleton. P258D does NOT create them.

candidate_input_data_contract.description: Read-only artifact contract for a candidate method's frozen OOS outputs.
constraints: each bet length == number_count_per_bet and within the lottery pool range
all feature_source_timestamps < target_draw available_information_timestamp_cutoff < target_draw draw time

p257a_baseline_input_contract.description: Read-only baseline artifact contract for paired comparison.
p257a_baseline_input_contract.alignment_rule: Baseline per-draw rows must be alignable to candidate per-draw rows by (lottery_type, n_bet_count, target_draw_id). Any unmatched draw is excluded from paired comparison and logged in the audit trail; coverage must be reported.
p257a_baseline_input_contract.source: P257A best-N-bet historical replay artifact (HISTORICAL_REPLAY_ONLY — not a future guarantee).

matched_null_family_contract.matching_rule: Each null member must mirror the candidate's declared degrees of freedom exactly; a mismatch triggers the rollback STOP gate.
matched_null_family_contract.lesson_guard_L96: hit-based nulls use per-draw Binomial(1, baseline_i), NOT label-shuffle (label-shuffle preserves the mean -> p=1.0).

provenance_contract.completeness_rule: 100% provenance completeness required before any endpoint is computed; otherwise rollback STOP gate.

validation_contract: leakage_provenance_validation: every feature_source_timestamp < available_information_cutoff < target draw time; provenance completeness == 100%.
timestamp_cutoff_validation: no same-day later draw / target draw / post-target draw enters features.
exact_nbet_matching_validation: candidate predicted_bets length == n_bet_count and number_count_per_bet matches the lottery contract.
null_family_matching_validation: every null member mirrors candidate degrees of freedom; family_size >= 1000.
correction_family_declaration_validation: the full candidate x null x lottery x N x metric x window family is declared before evaluation; untested-but-declared combinations still count.
no_production_recommendation_mutation_validation: assert no import of / call to recommendation/registry/production/controlled_apply/deployment/DB-write paths; assert artifact-only output.

future_artifact_schema_proposal_P258E.not_yet_rejected_semantics: NOT_YET_REJECTED is explicitly NOT approval; the candidate remains observation-only pending a separate human-authorized prototype + later corrected-OOS confirmation.

future_test_plan_P258E: schema_tests: gate artifact conforms to inputs/outputs schema; gate_decision in {REJECTED, NOT_YET_REJECTED}.
leakage_guard_tests: any feature timestamp >= cutoff fails closed.
null_matching_tests: null member with mismatched degrees of freedom triggers rollback.
baseline_matching_tests: candidate/baseline aligned by (lottery,N,target_draw_id); unmatched draws excluded + reported.
correction_family_tests: corrected p-values computed over the full declared family; undeclared combination rejected.
no_auto_approval_tests: NOT_YET_REJECTED never maps to approval; no promote path exists.
no_db_write_tests: orchestrator performs zero DB writes (assert via fake/asserted no-write boundary).

next_allowed_task.title: D3 gate read-only SKELETON / contract tests only (if explicitly authorized later)
next_allowed_task.type: read-only skeleton + contract tests only — no executable gate evaluation, no backtest, no DB write
next_allowed_task.precondition: P258D plan merged AND separate explicit authorization for P258E
next_allowed_task.note: P258E may only create non-executing skeleton modules + schema/contract tests. It may NOT run the gate against any candidate.

forbidden_next_tasks: executable gate evaluation or backtest unless explicitly authorized later
